creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/dconf does not support parallel builds.

I have marked the package MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE for the nonce so that we do
not break hundreds of unattended builds with FORCE_MAKE_JOBS after the
recent GNOME 2.32 upgrade.

In the long run, the upstream maintainers should see to the build system
so that devel/dconf supports parallel builds.  Unfortunately, I
currently lack the time to look deeper into this.
